prompt: A minimalist high-contrast black-and-white vector portrait of a young man from the shoulders up, shown in a three-quarter side profile facing left, with the face intentionally omitted or left blank as a clean negative space silhouette. He has thick tousled medium-length hair with layered volume, messy side-swept bangs, and sharp white highlight streaks across the black hair; one ear is clearly visible on the right side, and the jawline, neck, and collar are stylized with smooth graphic curves. He wears a dark simple crew-neck top or jacket rendered as a bold black shape with a few crisp white accent lines. The composition is centered and tightly cropped, with a plain light gray to off-white background, no text, no props, no extra objects, and no facial features. Use a sleek modern logo-like anime-meets-editorial silhouette style, clean vector edges, minimal shading, dramatic negative space, poster design aesthetics, and a square format.
